creator: tabthorpe@FreeBSD.org
text:
This appears to be an issue with spamass-milter being compiled with the base 
headers for sendmail instead of the ports headers.

Ensure environment variable WITH_SENDMAIL_PORT is set to yes, then recompile 
spamass-milter.


Thomas
-- 
Thomas Abthorpe		| FreeBSD Committer
tabthorpe@FreeBSD.org	| http://people.freebsd.org/~tabthorpe
